# Carbon Tracky

Carbon Tracky is an open-source, AI-powered carbon footprint tracker. 
It helps users understand their environmental impact by logging their daily habits related to transport, diet, and energy usage.

## Key Features
- Quick 90-second carbon footprint calculator.
- AI-driven personalized actions powered by Google Gemini.
- Comprehensive tracking of transport, dietary choices, and home energy.
- Open-source and privacy-focused design.

## Official Links
- **Website:** https://carbontracky.com
- **Dashboard:** https://carbontracky.com/dashboard
